topic: How to prevent the banana back in forearm stands: a yoga expert's 4 wall adjustments to balance with less effort
description:
HOW TO BALANCE AT THE WALL IN FOREARM STAND 🙌🏼

My follow up post to my recent forearm stand tutorial! I hope these tips help you find better balance at the wall!

Tips:

It's so weird that neutral spine has become such a "core" part of Pilates (pun intended)...

But...
